description: If you expect your footwear to be extremely comfortable coupled with great looks, you've come to the right place! These sandals from crocs pamper your feet all day long as you go about doing your daily chores. This versatile footwear can be paired with just about any kind of casual wear for a fab look. Upper Croslite material over-the-foot strap in a criss-cross design for maximum comfort and style Brand badge on the strap Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for shock absorption and added comfort Cushy footbed with circulation nubs made of Croslite for all-day comfort and a massage feel Brand name and logo embossed on the footbed Outsole Non-marking, slip-resistant Croslite outsole Platform wedge heel for extra comfort in all-day wear Multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfort shoe Care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
